name: Allioli
blurbShort: We're a small group of mostly visual artists and builders that seek to bring art, share and create in a friendly environment. Satelites of B&T
blurbLong:
After many years with Bread and Tomato and free camping family grows, we decide to gather interests and set up as a small new camp, focused on art installations, good food, chill...
Allioli is an ancient mediterranian sauce which is used to give a special touch to some meals, it can also be eaten with bread (and tomato). Preparing the sauce in the original traditional way is quite an ART, it takes technique, skill and patience.

name: Barrio del Sol
blurbShort: The best kind of madness. You just simply have to try it!
blurbLong:
Barrio Del Sol is a small Barrio with a big heart and good vibes. We host a wide range of daytime events including conscious workshops, loose parties, live music jam sessions and a few novelty concepts on the side. Our vibe is fun, intimate and laced with refreshing drinks and conversations. Come meet the family and don’t be afraid to lose your shoes or mind!

We have approximately 10 spaces this year and are doing two waves of applications. If you'd like to join our silly family, fill in the form at the google drive link...

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSe2ZXZHTkUYGsBOIXdlslldWq9GPLM2s_edW0wMsvu92K0YLA/viewform?usp=sharing&ouid=113124009619176101354

----------------

Barrio del Sol also needs your help to bring the pool back for Elsewhere 2026!

We're happy and grateful to have kept the project going so long with the help of everyone's donations. This year as well as the fun stuff, we have some repairs that  need funding to keep everything safe and well maintained. 

If you've enjoyed it before or want to this year, please take a look at our fundraiser:
https://www.crowdfunder.co.uk/p/pool2026

The pool is also supported by our wonderful Baywatch volunteers. f you're coming to Elsewhere 2026 and love the pool, please consider volunteering for one of the best shifts on the playa!...

https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1b8CBnYJ8YfN728oExeDlwBk0D7ow7vmkkhBd3aF3ZS0/edit?usp=sharing

name: Barrio Espace
blurbShort: Crazy, creative and inclusive « Space » for nobodies to connect ! We do fun workshops by day and cool parties by night.
blurbLong: Sure we can party 24h a day, 7 days a week, but what do we get out of it ?” Barrio Espace comes back as an “espace” for all nowhere individuals to mingle, exchange and learn from each others through creative self-expression and sharing. Unleash your imagination, have fun and discover other crazy people in our collaborative, artistic and radically wtf workshops, parties and events. Mostly french camp but open to all, we had all nationalities :)

name: Belly Town
blurbShort: Belly Town is here to celebrate the wonderful vessel of our adventures that is our body! After all, Nobodies are nothing without their bodies!
blurbLong:
Belly Town is a camp open to everyone looking to celebrate their body, those wonderful vessels of our human experience, in all their glory and complexity. During its first years, Belly Town offered activities such as dance classes, roughhousing games, hand balancing, body painting, and some inner exploration of one’s body, as well as physical therapy sessions and massages. 

If you too have a body, you are welcome!

name: Bread & Tomato
blurbShort: The catalan barrio where you can drink 'Porró' eat 'Pà amb tomàquet' and love the music. BRUTAL
blurbLong:
We are a growing local community, (catalan and international) genuine and including people eager to offer a safe space where you can connect, share your experiences and knowledge, dance and chill under our lovely big shade. 

Our core values are: community, radical self-love, radical acceptance and consent. We believe these are the fundamental principles that allow every member of the barrio to be able to enjoy the experience in complete respect of oneself and the others. 

We bring the Catalan culture to the desert with a surrealist touch, we offer some of the best vegetarian menus on the field (including paella), Brutal resident DJ sets, amazing free kisses and hugs, multiple workshops and crazy BIG art installations. 

Last but not least, we will fill your heart with joy and your stomachs with tons of ‘Pa amb Tomaquet’ tapas! Come to our sunset party on Thrusday afternoon and many other workshops during all week, let our juiciness seduce you – we won’t disappoint! 

Barrio powered by the brutal power of the desert SUN. 

Disclaimer: Celebrating our 10th anniversary this year, so we are working on some big and  BRUTAL surprises...

name: Camp Cambio
blurbShort: A Place of Wisdom, Wonder, and Wild Exchange - Mad Tea Partys, Cosy Vibes, Wonderful People & A Magic Rabbit Hole
blurbLong:
Camp Cambio
🌟 Greetings, wonderful Burners of Elsewhere! 🌟

We are thrilled to welcome you (back) to CAMP CAMBIO 2026 – a place of wisdom, wonder, and wild exchange. Rooted in a cozy oriental-themed haven, with the surreal twist of Wonderland, we invite you to slide down the rabbit hole and join us for a week of joyful madness and dreamy transformation.

✨ What we offer:
• Daily mad tea parties in a whimsical setting
• A magical Rabbit Hole where you can trade whatever you have too much of for something surprising
• Fun, thoughtful workshops held daily
• A welcoming Bedouin-style tent with shade, sound, board games, and cozy vibes
• A new stage, upgraded kitchen, cold drinks, big shade for the tents and better showers than ever before!

🌈 As a fully cooperative camp, Camp Cambio runs on the magic of everyone who joins. This is not an all-inclusive camp — we all contribute! Whether it’s cooking, cleaning, running workshops, or hosting mad tea parties, the work is shared equally among all participants.
The cowork is what makes it so special — a true co-creation of magic and community 💫

💪 To join, it’s mandatory to choose one of the following paths:
1️. Arrive for Build on Saturday, July 4th to help bring the camp to life or
2️. Stay for Strike and help pack everything away until the last carpet is rolled and all traces are gone (July 13th)

If you’re up for getting your hands dirty, sharing the joy, and creating some unforgettable memories — we have a few spare seats left! Reach out to us via Facebook to apply 🐇✨

Bring your tent, your sunscreen, your wild heart and open mind.

See you soon in the dust at CAMP CAMBIO 🐪🎪🔥🫖🌈

name: Come & Play
blurbShort: We’re here for the filth. We are a collective of dirty-minded enthusiasts with common goals and values, that co-creates an inclusive, consensual space for discovery, exploring intimacy, sexuality, kink and BDSM. Our drug of choice is endorphins!
blurbLong:
We’re here for the filth. We are a collective of dirty-minded enthusiasts with common goals and values, that co-creates an inclusive, consensual space for discovery, exploring intimacy, sexuality, kink and BDSM. Our drug of choice is endorphins!

We aim to be accessibility friendly and ecologically responsible. We’re here for innovative, safer, queer sexual exploration and expression. We celebrate the beauty of intimacy, promote sex-positivity, provide sex/kink education, challenge social norms, in a consent-centric big playground. BDSM and sexuality can be very challenging, we encourage (after)care and personal/community responsibility.

We focus experiences through the lenses of practical reality, body and mind, less through mystics and spirits. 

We aspire to be a barrio that values and respects differences, as well as various concepts of life. Together we create a community where differences counts as normal. We strive against any kind of prejudice, discrimination, exclusion, inequality and bigotry, such as: capitalistic values, the patriarchy, homophobia, transphobia, ableism, sexism, racism, cultural appropriation, ageism, stigma or kink shaming. 

Come and Play is located right next to the Check-In booth. We are some way off from the playa, harboring the quietest part of Elsewhere (except for the moaning). We have solar panels but close to no electrical amenities because we care about ecological responsibility (and we like it rough ...). Therefore, we provide a plant based diet with vegetarian options during Elsewhere. 

We strive to have flat hierarchies, and employ holacracy to decentralize our team organization. Everyone who joins us can choose at least one role, ranging from weather person to kitchen lead. 

Usually, we host lots of workshops, but this year we decided to downsize our activities and structures to focus on internal community care and save our resources for build on the new Elsewhere site. However, we rely on members to be proactive in the community. We ask/require everyone joining this year to volunteer at least once for NCA on top of their camp duties. If you want to join us, be aware that we are a work-intensive camp, even when we're chilling. We have pledged to spoil ourselves silly this year. This only works if everyone helps.  Our secret main kink is work. Our core burner principles are participation and community.

C&P is a sexy rendezvous in the desert, and you’re invited!

name: Curious Creatures
blurbShort: CURIOUS CREATURES IS BACK BABY!
blurbLong: Curious Creatures is a playful, kinky, sex-positive, and ambitious crew of international dreamers, builders, artists, and sensual explorers who build wild dreams in the dust. From ice cold slushie-fueled dancefloors, cozy multilevel shade structures, sexy play spaces to silly workshops. We gift intimacy, interaction, and inspiration. At Curious Creatures, you’re invited to rest, rave, reflect, and get a little weird. Whether you’re craving a cuddle puddle, dance wildly, a spark of mischief, or a deep, delicious connection. We’ve got a space for you. Or just chill in the mansion net, our space is yours to explore. While we are ambitious and build big, we stay open and helpful and prevent burn-burnouts. Our schedule is jam-packed with amazing activities, shows, and workshops that will ignite your curiosity and expand your horizons. Come say hi, stay for a cuddle, leave a little more curious.

name: Desert Dessert
blurbShort:
This is no picnic
this has no prize
But we have just enough sweetness
To keep you hypnotized
blurbLong:
The last dish, a cake dusted with powdered sugar and a sticky cherry on top, for bitter sweet music dancing on your tongue, like a swallowed chill that tickles in your throat with multiple flavors of sins.

Are you ready for a last bite that may take you to the sky, this endless rabbit hole of dreams, where time flips and the old is the new and the past converts into tomorrow?

What end do you wish for, how shall we write the tiramisu of your expectations.

*This is no picnic*

*this has no prize*

*but we have just enough sweetness*

*to keep you hypnotized*

- bar
- shades
- shelter
- DJ sets
- sofas
- siesta
- myst
- betriebsferien

Write us why you think you want to be a part of this barrio: desertdessert@untz[.]ch

name: Dusty Dreamers
blurbShort: At Dusty Dreamers we are a bunch of burners bringing liberation, celebration and dreams to Elsewhere
blurbLong: An internation 🔥 barrio with Celebration & Liberation as our core themes 🌈

name: EYAO
blurbShort: A queer utopia in the dust! An inclusive and diverse space for queer people to relax during the day and be entertained after siesta. With workshops every day (ranging from drag introduction to funeral for your ex) and the best Thursday night: the legendary queerberet at sunset, followed by the gayes
blurbLong:
EAT YOUR ART OUT is a Queer-powered camp, which aims to be FLINTA led wherever possible.
At EYAO we celebrate the full spectrum of diversity within the LGBTQIA+ community at Elsewhere.
We are a creative, minge loving, sensitive, twerk-tastic, gender bending, power ballad bashing Camp of camps.
Consent, social justice and inclusion are at the core of our space.
Come build a queer utopia, delight people in our veggie/vegan kitchen, organise workshops, sip cocktails at our bar, perform at the Queerberet and dance at our party, etc.
The possibilities are endless!

name: Garden of Joy
blurbShort: Food, Music and Love
blurbLong:
The Garden of Joy offers refuge throughout the week to all Nobodies thanks to a comfy chill area and a massive shade structure where Workshops and Music vibrate and delight.

Picture yourself a warm Italian kitchen and the most cosy chill out where everyone gathers to eat and talk and vibrate all along the day: this is the oasis we invite you to <3

Your Garden is built around a massive shade structure offering 3 zones : a kitchen/eating space reserved for the Gardeners, a dancefloor where we also hold workshops during the day, and a fantastic chill out area where most of the playa comes at day & night to enjoy life. 

We provide you FOOD three times a day, MUSIC from 4pm to 7am, with a stop for dinner, and LOVE all day long. 

You can place your tent behind our barrio, or at the barrio yet more away in the field, or in a quiet zone (free-camping areas) if you prefer.

Apply here: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScxB6EBFgHmogWiU31U0adPGlLdDUXKky4yuijLRku5xNf5aQ/viewform

name: Glitch
blurbShort: Glitch is a vibrant tent full of wonders and illusions. A lush and misty oasis in the midday desert heat and a temple of temptations at night.
blurbLong:
## What the Glitch?!?
We offer daylight dancing and water pistol fights, nighttime parties and workshops, pancakes and kinky circus. For this we maintain two main spaces: our amazing dancefloor and our famous playroom. We aim to provide a dedicated space for self-exploration and experimentation in all its forms, embracing burners of every background, orientation, shape and size.

If you still have no idea what Glitch is about and what you might find when stepping inside, don't worry! We're trying to figure it out too. Day by day. 

**We are an 18+ barrio for a reason!** Some events can get a bit wilder than others. Consult the What Where When Guide about what's on our menu and pick your flavours. Or just come around for a scoop of surprise. When at Glitch, **remember that consent is queen** , we put strong emphasis on providing a safe space for all participants.

## Want to camp with us?
Despite what we offer to the Playa, our barrio is mostly a home to our dusty Playa family: the Glitch Fam. We have communal dinners, a private chillout just for us, tons of shade to camp under and all the amenities a barrio needs. We always welcome doer souls that want to contribute and shape the current incarnation of Glitch. We have an ambitious build schedule as we like to create something stunning. We like to throw parties — this is why we live in the orange zone. Don't expect a particularly quiet barrio life. Do expect community.

## Still want to camp with us?
Our barrio is radically inclusive. We do not care if this is your first burn ever or if you remember buying your first Burning Man ticket right at the gate. We welcome those who seem to fit in for who they are. Make sure to tell us something about yourself when signing up. We aim to be financially accessible and try to reach a gender balance within our members when possible.

[Apply as a member here](https://forms.gle/3vK3AyHHA6Y7doC59)! You'll find more detailed information about our barrio in the form's intro.

name: Glowy Owl
blurbShort: A cosy, fluffy cocoon, woven from warm and caring bonds: a haven right on the playa, where music, performances and workshops come together in a joyful, laid-back atmosphere.
blurbLong:
Glowy Owl is a collective of dreamers, creators, and kindred spirits — a free, inclusive space where everyone is invited to express, feel, and connect through art, music, and emotion.

Open to the world and guided by intuition, Glowy Owl weaves timeless moments, bringing together diverse talents and visions to create immersive experiences and meaningful human connections. Everything we shape is inspired by love, light, and a shared sense of imagination.

At its core, Glowy Owl is an invitation to slow down. To pause, to breathe, to simply be. It’s a space to drift, reconnect, and rediscover a sense of inner balance while sharing authentic moments with others.

Through carefully curated and eclectic soundscapes ~ from melodic techno, to downtempo, psychill, and ambient ~ we craft deep, organic atmospheres that gently soothe the body and awaken the mind. Each experience is designed as a journey, offering a subtle yet powerful dose of joy, presence, and connection.

name: Herding Cats
blurbShort: Herding Cats: a paradox of autonomous spirits converging in beautiful chaos.
blurbLong:
Herding Cats: a paradox of autonomous spirits converging in beautiful chaos. We wander our own paths yet somehow find each other in moments of synchronicity.

Neither shepherds nor sheep — just nimble souls following shiny distractions into unexpected revelations. Our playground has no walls, our rules exist to be stretched, our wisdom comes through play.

Connections form and dissolve like desert mirages. Some nap in sunbeams, others climb impossible heights. Stumble upon us by chance or intent — each visit unrepeatable, each experience your own.

name: Here & Meow
blurbShort: You have arrived at the peaceful, yet playful oasis on the playa: a place to rest from the craziness of it all, to get cozy, to be nurtured and regain forces before dancing all night!
blurbLong:
Are we there yet? Are YOU there yet? Are you HERE? Are you in the NOW?

MEOWWWW!!! 

You have arrived at the peaceful, yet playful oasis on the playa: a place to rest from the craziness of it all, to get cozy, to be nurtured and regain forces before dancing all night!

Yoga, workshops and sunset dj-sets will dust your chakras and make you feel MEOW. But beware, because we are also finding our spirituality in less serious circumstances. This year again, our tribe is aiming to fly high with widespread wings of playfulness, weirdness, creativity and spice. Come join us for our legendary Acid Friday ecstatic dance while we wait for the end of the world, smiling and knowing this life is unique.

name: Hyperflow
blurbShort: Flowy family driven by mucho love
blurbLong:
Hyperflow is community, family, safety, self-expression, sustainability and mucho, mucho love. We rely in the flow of this wonderful kaleidoscope of colorful, easygoing humans who want to co-create a home-away-from-home.

Our, you included, home has 2 large shaded areas for holding workshops. We stress the importance of taking care of each other and we do it through nice meals together, a variety of hyper-workshops, thematic nights and events: some relaxing and pleasurable, some thought-provoking and daring, and some just purely for fun.

Are we a mirage in the desert? Come and find out and get totally lost with us..

name: JamHouse
blurbShort: Did someone say JAM session? At The JamHouse, we take that literally AND figuratively! We're cooking up a delicious blend of musical adventures and actual fruit preserves at Nowhere this year. Our barrio is home to impromptu concerts, instrument sharing, singalongs, and the playa's most mysterious s
blurbLong:
Did someone say JAM session? At The JamHouse, we take that literally AND figuratively! We're cooking up a delicious blend of musical adventures and actual fruit preserves at Nowhere this year. Our barrio is home to impromptu concerts, instrument sharing, singalongs, and the playa's most mysterious shower (it has a button—what does it do? Join to find out!).

Bring your musical talents or just your appreciation for good tunes and good company. Seasoned burners and burn virgins all welcome—the only requirement is your willingness to participate in our harmonious chaos.
Ready to get jammin' with us?

name: Jugaton
blurbShort: Jugaton is an evolving collective built on play, connection and curiosity. At our barrio, you might find a cuddle puddle, a kinky workshop, or the best music on the playa. Come as you are, bring your energy, and see what unfolds.
blurbLong:
Jugaton is an evolving collective built on play, connection and curiosity.

Our name is a playful twist on the Spanish word for “playful”—and that spirit runs through everything we do.

We create spaces where people can explore, connect and express themselves freely. Whether it’s music, movement, conversation or unexpected moments of joy, Jugaton is about embracing both lightness and depth.

At our barrio, you might find a cuddle puddle, a kinky workshop, or the best music on the playa often all in the same day. It’s a welcoming, open environment shaped by the people who show up, each bringing their own energy to the experience.

If you’re curious, open-minded, and ready to play, you’ll feel at home with us.

We are very happy to be open for new members (Jugatonies). If you would like to join us, we would love to get to know you better. 

We are just in the process of updating our website but here is the application form to join the camp: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeiO6RtRutOcAP7m5HV9VpELVv6UDhRdyCPbVldW7U3Pum7vw/viewform?usp=sharing&ouid=105159852975835076300 

Looking forward to being silly with you on the playa!

name: Le Gratin
blurbShort:
Le Gratin is, without false modesty, the cream of the crop — the self-proclaimed elite, the gratinated summit of the playa, the crispy top layer that everyone comes to scrape.
Everything simmers: sex-positive spaces, kinky explorations, creativity, veggi feasts, and warm queer vibes.
Come taste us.
blurbLong:
Le Gratin is a convivial gathering of french potatoes, golden to the core, still steaming, delicately dusted with dust and a touch of insolence.

Here, everything simmers together: sex-positive spaces, kinky explorations, creative sparks, vegan feasts, and warm queer vibes, in a blend that is as meltingly delicious as it is crispy.

Yes, without false modesty (nor real merit), we are the cream of the crop — the self-proclaimed elite, the gratinated summit of the playa, the crispy top layer that everyone comes to scrape.

Primarily francophone, we welcome any human who is francophile, francocreative, franco-wild, or simply looking for a frankly good spot. To join us, keep a tender heart and a desire to melt away. Come taste us — and take away all our gratintude.

name: Mercurial Retrogrades
blurbShort: our little camp of shenanigans and imperfection
blurbLong:
We're into Helium karaoke and banana crafting workshops, and *our* idea of sex-positivity is: sexy teeth brushing competitions!

Despite our name we're no astrology camp: "Mercurial Retrogrades" refers to the optical illusion of the planet Mercury, when viewed from Earth, seemingly reverting its path of movement backwards. Which to us means: "Ever tried. Ever failed. No matter. Try again. **Fail again. Fail better.**"

More specifically, we aim for:
- a camp size of **about 25 people**
- **contributing** to Nowhere fun workshops and art
- **manageable** workloads (it's hot enough as it is)
- (pragmatically balanced) **radical inclusion** of weirdoes and weaklings
- a **flat hierarchy** where everyone's encouraged to take on one lead role
- productive failure: **Yes, We Can't!**

name: Mini Camp
blurbShort: A music and light themed camp, a place to explore yourself through sound, visuals, and movement.
blurbLong:
A music and light themed camp, a place to explore yourself through sound, visuals, and movement. 

Don't let the name fool you :)

name: Mirage
blurbShort: We’re a bunch of open-minded, welcoming and well-organized folks who like to provide a safe haven for all under the hot Spanish sun. We look to create a living room atmosphere which serves as a safe space for people that want to hang around in a chill, playful, and non-sexual environment.
blurbLong:
We want to express our inner nerd and partake in endless shenanigans! We are happy to host workshops that are informative, scientific, nerdy, or outright fun and playful! Next to this, we just want to chill with our family under the stretch tent while listening to good music. 
Above all, we want to create a space where we can care for each other, grow with one another and build a spectacular camp and community together. A place where we can live, dance, love and have new experiences and connect with new and old friends on the Spanish playa. Every Year, we also bring the Stereo Spa: A big cosy Dome with a hanging Upside Down Fire and music that sends you on a journey.
Come and join us in this exciting and wonderful adventure! Whether you are a new member or have been with us before, we can’t wait to see you in the dust!

name: Mooncows
blurbShort: Mooncows is back for more! More of what? Come and find out.
blurbLong:
Moooooooooooooo
Mooooooo
Moooooooooo
We are an London-based community of international people that run forrest raves. We love playing music and providing a caring, inclusive, and safe place for you to express and celebrate yourself.
We offer a cosy living room space for chilling and chatting, and a range of workshops from dancing, massages, throwing tantrums, to random stuff that our cows can think of, serious or quirky.
We may return with our Moonbull, aka our mobile soundystem to throw parties in random areas of the playa each night!
We love creativity and have a few artworks around the playa.
AND OF COURSE, PICKLES
Mooooo
Moooooooo
Moooo

name: NoBarrio
blurbShort: NoBarrio is a wild, multilingual tribe of beautiful nobodies rising from the ashes of Monegros, united by radical participation, a passion for community, and a burning desire to bring their art and charm to the dust.
blurbLong:
NoYear after NoYear our family of free-campers has grown as friends and other Nobodies joined us, and finally this year we realised that really we are already NoBarrio, so we are excited to formalise our status. NoBarrio is a wild, multilingual tribe of beautiful nobodies rising from the ashes of Monegros, united by radical participation, a passion for community, and a burning desire to bring our art and charm to the dust. Since we are mostly local to Monegros, our primary language is Castellano, although we do have Euskara, Catalan, Portuguese, German, Esperanto, and English speakers within our group. 

All NoBarrioistas contribute to the smooth running and chill vibe of our camp. Communal effort and participation are in our DNA, and we strive for immediacy and to recognise and improve our inner selves.

name: Oasis Playground
blurbShort: Out of a tribe of funloving humans we forge your disfunctional family haven in the dessert of Monegros. Welcoming all dusty beings wandering around to come and chill with us.
blurbLong:
**Who we are?**

Oasis Playground is 40 humans strong and  famous for it's hospitality. Welcoming all  wanderers to come and chill with us. It's the perfect camp to come chat, dance and chill in the afternoon and early evening away from all the madness and regain your bearings. 
We have a fresh and airy (for desert standards) chillout space with some hammocks and lots of cushions, where you can come find peace for your siesta. 

**What we gift**

We host some pretty awesome workshops every year, including our infamous **Tittie Appreciation Hour**.  Also workshops, performances, activities, exchanges about a wide range of topics, and pretty much anything you would like to contribute with.

**How we live**

Our palatial shade structure, Hot and cold beverages and pitiful excuse for a shower will keep you from overheating during the day. At night, we're the relaxed home you can come back to after exploring the wonders of the playa. 
Our camp is centered around a shaded space in the Yellow zone overviewing the mountains with a chill area, dining area, and workshop/dancefloor area. 
Our kitchen leads offer incredible desert-style vegetarian meals, snacks and refreshments. In essence, we have all basic amenities, always covered in dust and surrounded by awesome peeps. 
We're always aiming to be a small camp (around 40-50 people), so our members get the chance to know each other and help us co-create this magical experience.

**Want to join our family?**

Applications are open! Fill out the [Application form](https://forms.gle/okrWW6XJkwNHaakD6) to apply.

name: Olive Odyssey
blurbShort: Welcoming, home-like, chill out kingdom of soothing delights, comfortable spots, water sprays, morning coffee and cold beer.
blurbLong:
Dive into the Mediterranean, where our essence splashes the middle of Nowhere. Come and experience our spiced mix of cultures and traditions from all along the Mediterranean coast.

Embrace "Dolce far niente" in our gently furnished lounge and delight in strong black coffee in your belly in the morning – at whatever time the coffee maker wakes up – or our special of the special in the afternoon bar – the secret ingredient is a secret!

Our marketing team says we offer ‘eclectic & exotic music, hairy chests and a usually relaxed atmosphere’ – although this depends on the family drama and whether the noisy people are being noisy or not.

The place where hummus meets salmorejo, Ottomans meet Crusaders, Belly Dancers meet Flamenco, and Renaissance painters and math nerds meet sleazy and extroverted hippies. All of that dressed with a bit of olive oil, of course. Yalla, malakas!

Tell us why would you like to become an olivita here: https://forms.gle/Qtq5ZhWuhFnSBfTk8

name: Peach Please
blurbShort: A queer-focused, sex-positive camp, with workshops, themed events at night, and an open play space. We stand for a place where people of all genders, sexual and romantic orientations, and backgrounds can form connections free from shame, find community and spread the love. Wider.
blurbLong: A queer-focused, sex-positive camp, with workshops, themed events at night, and an open play space. We stand for a place where people of all genders, sexual and romantic orientations, and backgrounds can form connections free from shame, find community and spread the love. Wider.

name: People's Democratic Republic of Fiascostan
blurbShort: Shaded siesta area for everyone, workshops, Epic Speeches and lots of fuckery - we aim high and we accomplish very little.. Buckle up for disappointment!
blurbLong:
The People's Democratic Republic of Fiascostan is a newly independent state formed from the remnants of Camp Fiasco. The camp that brought you the epic Acqua Gallo and broke nowhere forewer. The camp with the recurring unmissable Epic Speech Hour, where anyone gets to say whatever they want into a microphone, epic music playing, to a crowd that's guaranteed to cheer whatever they say.. This year daily.

Come join us for chill siestas in our soft-floored, shaded afternoon lowkey hangs. Then drop by for absolute fucking nonsense at any other time.

name: Pink poney paradise
blurbShort: A barrio in the middle of the playa with basics only
blurbLong:
Just halfway between full sound and sex-positive zones, this place is a queer heaven where everyone can feel safe.
Barrio only provides basics : shade, workshop space, watercubes and extinguishers. Bring your own if you need.
No collective meals, no shifts, no schedule. No other rule than ten principles.

Admission by the core of the group, radically inclusive. Need to have been on a big burn at least one time before or being vouched by so.

name: Planet Pulpo
blurbShort: Welcome to the underwater world in the middle of the desert. We bond through our communal praise of the mighty Pulpo (octopus) and dedication to maximum silliness.
blurbLong:
Underwater, things look different. Not better. Not worse. Just… suspiciously distorted.

We come together through our communal praise of Octavia, our hand-knitted octopus god who weighs approximately as much as a Fiat. She sees everything, judges nothing out loud. Under her reign, our band of lovely weirdos - mostly English and Spanish speaking, with an expanding Catalan contingent (take that B&T), have built something unreasonable in the desert: an underwater world, a spa, and cold beer from the dust of nothing. This is the power of Octavia.

At Planet Pulpo, our creatures have long since stopped caring about the things surface humans obsess over. Pants? Optional. Dignity? Negotiable. Personal coherence? Under review.

We work hard as we play hard. Everyone participates. We are not a party camp, we are a silliness camp, which is more serious than it sounds. Someone is always five minutes from either starting a revolution or inventing a new religion based on cheese. Both outcomes are considered a success.

Twice a week: The Pulpo Spa. The FoD is dirty. You are dirty. Our underwater oasis performs a minor miracle. We will rinse you, fluff you, and you will leave marginally cleaner and more together than when you arrived. Which, let's be honest, is a low bar and a high achievement.

The rest of the time: chaos research, world domination logistics, and pranks so conceptually advanced, other barrios don’t always get it. But who cares? We think we are funny and isn’t that all that matters?

All underwater creatures are welcome. Pulpos by birthright, jellyfish by nature, clown fish by chaos. The barnacle that sticks around long enough gets reclassified as a pet.

We are good people. We swear. Just… don't turn your back on the tentacles.

Planet Pulpo. Praise Be.

name: Planet Resilium
blurbShort: The future is here and we didn’t just survive, we thrived. We solved the climate and water crisis. Robots did not take over. Peace, harmony and biodiversity did. But we didn’t do it on our own, we never could have. We did it together. Come with us to build Planet Resilium.
blurbLong: On our Planet, we play the long game. We are here to stay and cross the centuries in harmony with our surroundings. What if we could cancel the apocalypse? Can a more rational, fair and collaborative use of existing resources stop the consumption and pollution craze while preserving the warmth of safe, nurturing, serene human life and community? On Planet Resilium, we dedicate ourselves to finding those answers in a collective and inclusive way, and then creating a blueprint for a sustainable, resilient Barrio, which anyone will be able to use as inspiration to build their own community. We burn without zip-ties, without hierarchical leads, without generators and petrol-based augers. Come imagine new positive futures with us featuring low-tech solutions, solar cooking, and workshops to re-imagine our lives both Elsewhere and in the default world.

name: Ran'Dome
blurbShort: Ran’Dome® is Elsewhere’s french pub, offering music, games, workshops, food, drinks, dancing, and a cozy, welcoming space. Members can volunteer, participate in activities, and enjoy an open stage for musical projects and workshops, creating a safe and fun environment for all.
blurbLong:
Bienvenue chez Ran’Dome®, le pub de Elsewhere ! (english version below)
Son nom parle pour lui-même. Ici, on peut venir écouter de la musique, jouer, apprendre des choses totalement random®, manger, boire, danser, se donner rendez-vous, se reposer, se sentir comme chez soi, en sécurité dans un cadre chaleureux, bien qu'un peu poussiéreux.
Ran’Dome® récidive pour sa 12e année dans le désert, comme le camp où tout peut arriver !
Chaque membre s’investit dans la création d’une activité random® à partager avec la communauté.
Ici, on aime faire la fête toute la nuit et on écoute plein de styles musicaux différents et parfois très random®.

On préfère s’amuser que travailler, mais on aime que tout roule nickel, avec un maximum de confort pour un moindre effort. On est donc super organisés et, quand on bosse, on se donne à fond ! Ici, en amont et au build, ça carbure ! Ce qui laisse la place pour la créativité et l’improvisation et nous permet d’être détente tout au long de la semaine.
Ran’Dome® est peut-être le barrio demandant le moins de shifts de camp, ce qui lui permet d’être le barrio le plus volontaire au près de Elsewhere.

On compte sur vous pour faire des étincelles !
Worshops en journée, musique en soirée, tous les participants de Elsewhere qui cherchent un espace pour concrétiser un projet random® sont invités à contacter nos Co-Leads Animation et Musique (workshop@randome.camp ou soundome@randome.camp ) et nous aiderons à sa réalisation !

--

Welcome to Ran’Dome®, Elsewhere’s pub!
The name says it all. This is the place to come listen to music, play, learn totally random® things, eat, drink, dance, meet up, relax, and feel right at home, safe in a cozy, if not slightly dusty atmosphere.

Ran’Dome® is back again for its 12th year in the desert, it’s the camp where anything can happen!
Every member contributes by creating a random® activity to share with the community.
Here, we love to party all night long and we listen to every kind of music, very random® indeed.
We prefer fun over work, but we like things running smoothly, with maximum comfort for minimum effort. That’s why we try to be super organized, and when we do work, we give it our all!
At both setup and build time, this place runs at full speed, cleaning the path for creativity and improvisation, and letting everyone stay relaxed all week long.

Ran’Dome® might be the camp with the fewest required shifts, but that makes it the most eager and engaged barrio in all of Elsewhere.
We’re counting on you to make some sparks fly!
Daytime workshops and night music, any participant looking for a space to bring a random® project to life are welcome to contact our Animation and Music Co-Leads (workshop@randome.camp or soundome@randome.camp), and we’ll help make it happen !

name: Shenanicamp
blurbShort:
More than three gazebos and a dream. Life's too short to join a functioning  barrio. Why not not make it even shorter?
Our motto: "Over-promise, Under-deliver". Third year in a row of consistently failing to provide a sex-negative space.
blurbLong:
Since 2018, an ever-shifting collective of free-camp slum dwellers has survived an immeasurable number of land grabs, along with the gains and catastrophic losses of cheap gazebos and loosely interpreted “structures” - often immediately destroyed at the first whiff of wind or light rain.

Despite years of struggle, we have remained true to our nature: steadfastly refusing to learn even the simplest lessons. Digging trenches on the correct side? Optional. Pegging structures before a storm? Philosophically debatable. We trust deeply in our karmic balance, which betrays us with admirable consistency.

But at last, our perseverance has paid off.

After years of guerrilla takeovers of increasingly questionable free-camp real estate - we have finally accrued enough generational wealth (almost a third of a container worth) to put our name on the map.

And who knows - this might finally be the year we achieve our childhood dream: powering a small fridge.

### What we offer

- Options to buy equity in our future cult
- Access to a small fridge (pending budget review) 
- A steadily decreasing fatality rate, projected to reach 8% by 2030
- Open office hours for bad advice
- Dildo throwing
- A baboon-faced wooden cart for itinerant shits and giggles
- Discounted Shame & Repent™ tokens when enrolling in our Sex-Negativity Program (apply before June 2026)
- One Pound Fish (or peanut dust)
- CCTV access to secret locations around playa

If you're bad at stuff, but good at heart, love a laugh and doing random shit around playa, this may be the right place for you. As long as you can actually find it.

Radically underprepared since 2018. Come for the fridge. Stay for lack of options.

name: sssh!
blurbShort: In the middle of the storm, sssh is your home. Massage, meditation, veggie food - and a good night's sleep.
blurbLong:
LOVE MASSAGE AND MEDITATION? JOIN BARRIO SSSH FOR ELSEWHERE 2026!

Every day we run intro to massage workshops, meditations of every kind, and tantra classes.

Our food is veggie. Our camping is quiet - oh, and we have an annual mud bath. What more could you ask for? We've been doing this 10+ years.

Just fill in the sssh! form... we'd love to have you.
sssh!

https://sites.google.com/view/barriosssh/home

name: The Gallo Group
blurbShort: Your friendly conglomerate for beverages & beyond. Est. 2023
blurbLong:
The Gallo Group is hereby expressing  interest in reserving real estate in your event.
We plan a large performance area for this years event and might require resources.

Final confirmation on whether we are a Barrio or Art Project will be made depending on tax breaks and other concessions you might be able to offer.

name: Werkhaüs
blurbShort:
Werkhaüs is the place for volunteers to camp and enjoy
If you've done your Werk or want a place to talk about how we could Werk more, come and see us during the event.
blurbLong:
# How to live in Werkhaüs during set up and/or strike?

Werkhaüs is the living space of everybody working with NCA during set up & strike.
- Create an account on HUMANS
- Sign up for set-up and/or strike crew (choose your duration, choose your team(s))
- Wait for validation (& your early entry)
- Validation received? congratulations! you will be part of Werkhaüs as long as you are involved with one of the teams operating during set-up or/and strike.
**BEWARE**: living with Werkhaüs during set up or strike doesn’t mean you automatically join Werkhaüs during the event (as a barrio). you will have to register.

# How to join US during the event?

Werkhaüs is a home for workers, and common **CRITERIAS**
- A year round role
- Set up / strike for a minimum of 7 days
- Minimum of 20h shifts during event

*if you are combining one or more of these: well done! we love your werk! and try to not die!

# Admission steps

- Create your profile on HUMANS
- Pre-registration
- Receive confirmation
- Fill out the real registration
- Pay your fees
- Sign up for barrio shifts (yes more work)

# In exchange of your fees and hard work you will have access to:

- Community that "sweats together and sticks together"
- Proletarian hub
- Large shade
- Comfy siesta space
- Space for your tent
- Showers
- Three meals per day & snacks
- Water for the entire event
- Two beers / sangria / soft a day (and more if you want it)
- Communal bar

# Registration Form

Soon

name: Wonderever
blurbShort: The Best Kept Secret on the Playa
blurbLong:
Wonderever is the best kept secret on the playa. Since 2013 we’ve harboured a web of wonderful wanderers that work hard, play hard and take care of each other in the heat!

Our camp is a vibrant haven nestled at the top of the plaza. We’re a diverse community that values connection, co-creation, hammocks, and the art of relaxing. We provide a living room where hammocks sway gently in the (shady) breeze, breathtaking balcony views, and a touch of silliness in our ceremonial chapel. Wonderever – totally not a cult.

We supply the usual: water, showers, shade for tents, food and drinks. On top of that we have several chill spaces, hammocks and lounge nets.

Join us for a unique blend of relaxation, warmth, and community. We’re a queer friendly camp and value diversity. Anyone and everyone is welcome here!

name: Yes!
blurbShort:
Spiritual seekers with a twist of sexiness. Dozens of workshops from tantra to shibari, a kitchen that feeds 60 (and
  occasionally uses camp members as serving trays), and enough radlers to power a solar build. Eccentric, kind, and
  unapologetically curious — come say YES.
blurbLong:
We are spiritual seekers with a twist of sexiness — eccentric, kind, and unapologetically curious about what happens when you surrender to the playa.

  ## What we do

  Our camp shelters 60 humans under enough shade to survive the Spanish sun, with **two dedicated workshop spaces** hosting dozens of sessions: tantra, authentic relating, breathwork, rope arts, movement, flavour tripping, and things we haven't named yet. Evenings bring surprises in our domes and stretch tents — you'll have to show up to find out.

  ## How we live

We stick to the **quieter end of the playa** (it helps with what little sleep we end up getting) and we went full solar years back. Our kitchen cooks for the whole family — and has been known to use camp members instead of serving trays. Morning circles keep us grounded. Radlers keep us building.

## What matters to us

**Consent is everything.** You don't have consent without us — mandatory workshops, ongoing conversations, and a culture that means it. We're sex-positive but never sex-pressured. 15+ countries, no hierarchy, full participation.

## Want in?

If this sounds like your kind of beautiful chaos, apply now and come say **YES**.
